programme.desc: George spots an army of ants, something the Man with the Yellow Hat warned his messy monkey about.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Quiet Time at School/ Naptime in Blanket City
programme.desc: It's quiet time at school, but Daniel and Miss Elaina don't want to stop playing with their trains. Teacher Harriet shows the kids the different ways they can settle down, like stretching, reading a book, or closing your eyes.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: From Pluto With Love/ A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The kids learn all about Pluto during Valentine's Day as Mindy gets intrigued by Pluto's 'heart' of ice. While Sydney directs the kids in a backyard movie about the formation of a star.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: Bird Song: No Need to Shout
programme.desc: Follow a curious bunny named Elinor as she asks the questions in every child's mind.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Julia's Haircut
programme.desc: Elmo, Abby and Alan play hair salon and pretend to be hair stylists to help Julia feel less scared about getting a haircut.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Spoon Sounds/ Robotta the Artiste
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Pinkalicious and her brother Peter.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Advanced Dough
programme.desc: Mary and Paul up the ante to see which bakers will rise to the challenge. The competitors must make enriched sweet fruit loaves for their Signature, followed by a Technical challenge that stretches them to the limit.

programme.title: Last Tango in Halifax: Reunited After 60 Years
programme.desc: Celia and Alan, childhood sweethearts reunited after 60 years, are stranded when Alan’s car is stolen.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Van der Valk: Love in Amsterdam
programme.desc: Art, politics and passion mix in a case that breaks in Piet’s new assistant, Cloovers, and also prompts discord with police chief Dahlman. A bitter political campaign counts down to a fateful election.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Love Day/ A New Leaf
programme.desc: Shiny decides to show Tiny how much she loves her; Tiny, Shiny, Buddy and Don have fun doing their chores.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog: The March of the Sea Turtles/ A Squirrely Situation
programme.desc: A lovable, oversized canine, Clifford, emphasizes good citizenship and community.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Users
programme.desc: When crime scene photos from a young girl's murder turn up on the internet, her father directs blame at the therapist. After clearing his alibi, the detectives are led down an unexpected path towards unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unholiest Alliance
programme.desc: When one of their own is implicated in a coverup, the SVU struggles to unravel a sex trafficking operation deeply rooted in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Sheltered Outcasts
programme.desc: Det. Carisi goes undercover at a homeless shelter while investigating a string of neighbourhood rapes.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fashionable Crimes
programme.desc: A young model is raped by a renowned photographer who looks to his successful brother to make her disappear.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assaulting Reality
programme.desc: The producers of a reality dating series make Benson and the SVU part of the show when they investigate contestant’s claims that she was raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Imposter
programme.desc: A man tears his family apart when he uses a prominent fake identity to lure a vulnerable wife and mother to his bed. Barba argues that the evidence amounts to rape, but he's faced with a powerful defence attorney and skeptical judge.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean Out Your Junk Drawer
programme.desc: Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famed doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book 'Clean Out Your Junk Drawer' encourages people to get rid of all their emotional junk to become healthier people.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up
programme.desc: Phil has a new client who happens to be 'his type.' Knowing that might get him in trouble with Claire, he tells some seemingly innocent lies, which then lead to more, and soon enough he's in a full spiral.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Phil has the crazy idea of going on a trip to Paris with Claire, however, they are both so ridiculously tired but try to push through it. Meanwhile, Jay has taken over their bathroom remodel, which proves hazardous to the family.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Party
programme.desc: Manny and Luke are in charge of babysitting Lily so that the adults can enjoy a day to themselves. Claire and Gloria have a lovely trip to the spa planned, Phil and Mitch nerd out at the movies and Jay and Cam go to a sports bar to watch the big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Man Shouldn't Lie
programme.desc: Claire brings home a stray dog and gets the kids to help her hide it from Phil while she tries to find its owner. Unfortunately, her evasive behaviour only makes Phil try even harder to shower her with more attention.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Climbing Into Bed
programme.desc: After a botched undercover job, Ruzek is under scrutiny by the new Street Deputy Crowley who will determine his future with the unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Never Know Who's Who
programme.desc: A suspicious person call turns into a murder investigation when Burgess and her temporary partner discover the body of a dead man in an SUV.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: One Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence sets out to find a missing teenaged boy who they believe poses a serious threat to the students at his wealthy school after finding disturbing drawings in his notebook.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: In a Dark, Dark House
programme.desc: After years of pursuit and a countless number of murders, Langston comes face-to-face with serial killer Nate Haskell inside the house where his killing spree first began.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Smokescreen, Part II
programme.desc: As the team continues to search for a terrorist cell in Los Angeles, Callen and Sam remain trapped in a movie theater after multiple bombs have detonated and every remaining exit is wired with explosives.

programme.title: NCIS: Corporal Punishment
programme.desc: The NCIS team pays a heavy price when they try to track down a Marine who believes he is still in Iraq. After a violent confrontation, the team realizes the Marine is the subject of a secret experiment.

programme.title: NCIS: Tribes
programme.desc: A Muslim marine is found dead near a mosque that is suspected by the FBI of being a recruitment centre for terrorists. Their search of the building is delayed when Ducky refuses to autopsy the marine in deference to his family's religious beliefs.

programme.title: NCIS: Stakeout
programme.desc: When high-tech naval radar goes missing, the NCIS team stakes out a warehouse to catch a suspected thief but witness a murder instead.

programme.title: NCIS: Dog Tags
programme.desc: When the NCIS team investigates a fatal dog mauling, Abby puts her career on the line to prove the dog's innocence in order to save his life. Meanwhile, Gibbs zeros in on the secret Jenny is keeping.

programme.title: NCIS: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When the dead body of arms dealer La Grenouille surfaces, the NCIS team is put under investigation for his murder by the FBI and Jenny Shepard becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: NCIS: Neverland

programme.title: NCIS: Stop the Bleeding
programme.desc: Gibbs fights for his life aboard a Navy hospital ship after being shot. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and Joanna Teague travel to Shanghai to try and take down the Calling.

programme.title: NCIS: Personal Day
programme.desc: Gibbs calls on the team to assist DEA Agent Luis Mitchell with a case that keeps going cold. Also, the team gossips about Gibbs' new look after he replaces his standard military haircut and polo shirt for a modern cut and tailored dress shirt.

programme.title: NCIS: Incognito
programme.desc: Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to investigate the murder of a marine who was killed hours before meeting Gibbs about a possible case.

programme.desc: When an affluent family learns that a homeless teenager is attending their children's school, they invite him home and make him a part of their family. Under the guidance and nurturing of the family, the boy becomes a football star and an NFL prospect.

programme.desc: Lucy is sure her train trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Homecoming
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Ricky is hailed as a major celebrity.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Marshall Williams from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'Follow Me to Daisy Hills' and Hallmark Channel's 'Bubbly Sesh' podcast hosts, Jacks and Shawl stop by.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Judson Mills from the Hallmark Movies & Mysteries original movie 'JL Family Ranch: The Wedding Gift,' and star Alison Sweeney and Larissa Wohl visit.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: A woman fosters a retired military dog, while recovering from her broken engagement. When the dog's trainer returns home to claim his pup, she finds just what she looking for to mend her broken heart.

programme.title: Movie: Nature of Love
programme.desc: A city girl is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort where she faces her fears and tries out the camp's activities with the help of a handsome outdoorsman.

programme.title: The Office: Roy's Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding toast of Pam's ex fiancé Roy causes Pam and Jim to examine their relationship for buried secrets.

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Ancestry
programme.desc: Andy learns he is related to Michelle Obama and flaunts his bloodlines.

programme.title: The Office: Work Bus
programme.desc: When Jim convinces Dwight that the building is unsafe, Dwight rents a bus and sets up the office inside. Nellie asks for Andy's help in adopting a baby and Jim tries to make Pam happy with some pie.

programme.title: The Office: Here Comes Treble
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the office and Andy invites his college a capella group to perform. Dwight searches for evidence of a madman loose in the office.

programme.title: The Office: The Boat
programme.desc: Andy must man up when his Dad blows all the family money. When Dwight is interviewed on local radio, Jim and the office torture him with bizarre call ins.

programme.title: The Office: The Whale
programme.desc: Dwight finds himself needing to be able to sell to women so Pam and the ladies help him out.

programme.title: The Office: The Target
programme.desc: Angela discovers her husband's affair with Oscar and goes to Dwight for help. Jim needs a favour from Stanley and Phyllis who milk it for all it's worth.

programme.title: The Office: Lice
programme.desc: Pam accidentally brings lice into the office and lets Meredith take the fall. Meanwhile, Jim has a fantastic day in Philly wooing a potential business associate.

programme.title: Tosh.0: IceJJFish
programme.desc: Daniel goes on a date with a girl, gives away his car, and golden-throated singer Ice JJ Fish gets a web redemption.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Rich Piana
programme.desc: Daniel finds out if a hard body has a soft side, proves that other cultures' wedding traditions are just as horrible as American traditions and reveals why he's the perfect person to sleep with in case of an emergency.

programme.title: Tosh.0
programme.desc: Daniel premieres the episode filmed before the COVID-19 pandemic shut down production on the show and pays tribute to a late friend and Hollywood star.

programme.title: Tosh.0: WinDgoe
programme.desc: Daniel meets a guy who invented a bike that breaks the sound barrier, a chef whose favorite kitchen utensil is her mouth and a bachelor who would never pass a background check for 'The Bachelor.'

programme.title: Military Makeover: Marquez Family Episode 2
programme.desc: Now that the Marquez family is moved out, it's time for the Military Makeover team to transform their house into their forever home.

programme.title: The Closer: Drug Fiend
programme.desc: In a case that hits too close to home for Brenda, a well-liked cancer doctor is brutally killed and his drug supply wiped clean. To make matters worse, Captain Raydor has a new assignment that leaves Brenda questioning her loyalty to Pope.

programme.title: The Closer: Last Rites
programme.desc: The murder of a priest puts the squad on a collision course with the Catholic Church and drives a wedge between Brenda and Chief Pope. Meanwhile, Brenda's parents are in town while her father continues his cancer treatments.

programme.title: The Closer: Armed Response
programme.desc: A young couple hanging out in someone else's house find themselves in hot water when a security guard winds up dead in the street outside. Meanwhile, Raydor and Pope finally pinpoint the leak in the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: There Be Ghosts
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must unravel an old ghost story in order to solve a double murder at a hospital. Angela convinces Frankie to stop avoiding Kent and accept his invitation to a concert.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dead Weight
programme.desc: When a bicyclist appears to spontaneously combust, Maura proves his bizarre death is actually a murder and helps catch the science-savvy killer. Meanwhile, Jane's invited to teach a class of FBI recruits at Quantico.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: 2M7258-100
programme.desc: In the series' 100th episode, Jane goes undercover in a county jail to draw out the killer of a brutal murder.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: The Honeymoon Begins
programme.desc: The couples wake up in paradise and start to learn about the person they just married. Some find the path to love natural while others find it difficult to push past their comfort zones.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: I See Red Flags
programme.desc: As the couples enjoy the last few days of their action-packed honeymoon in Mexico, they discover more similarities and differences that will affect their marriages. Meanwhile, one of the couples must navigate their first major fight.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: The Honeymoon is Over
programme.desc: Our five couples who were married at first sight return from their honeymoon and move into their new homes together but it doesn't take long for reality to set in. Now the real work begins.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: Reconstructing the Crime Scene (Part 1)
programme.desc: On April 15th 2013, two bombs explode during the iconic Boston Marathon, killing three spectators and injuring hundreds others. In a race against time, investigators, using state of the art technology, circulate images to the public.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut
programme.desc: A rare weather event churns up rogue waves as supermoon tides collide with a cyclonic snowstorm. Josh and Casey face a 55-foot monster, while Jake risks capsizing to repair his rudder in unruly seas. Monte's big move north pays off in massive pots.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: A Problem Like Maria
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: The Cornelia Marie's deck becomes a gauntlet for Josh and Casey's greenest greenhorn as the super snow-moon storm peaks. Monte scrambles to stay afloat amid ice fog, and Harley loses an engine.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: End of the Beginning
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: Sad news rattles the Cornelia Marie wheelhouse as the fleet mounts a final winter season push. Wild Bill's deckhands must devise a bush fix or face hauling pots by hand, and Gappy overcomes a painful injury.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: Saga loses a veteran deckhand, forcing Jake to steam a greenhorn army to the Russian line. Amid scuttlebutt that ports are closing due to a virus, Josh fights to get home for a reunion with his brother and Sig's daughter gets rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Growing the Wolfpack
programme.desc: The family of nine takes advantage of an early spring to make progress on unfinished business. However, a visitor from Billy's distant past brings potential to undermine the future of Browntown and what means to be a member of the wolf pack.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.desc: Saga loses a veteran deckhand, forcing Jake to steam a greenhorn army to the Russian line. Amid scuttlebutt that ports are closing due to a virus, Josh fights to get home for a reunion with his brother and Sig's daughter gets rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Growing the Wolfpack
programme.desc: The family of nine takes advantage of an early spring to make progress on unfinished business. However, a visitor from Billy's distant past brings potential to undermine the future of Browntown and what means to be a member of the wolf pack.

programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lake of Blood
programme.desc: Six breathtaking images reveal six unfathomable mysteries.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Weird barren rings in the Namib Desert, an island the size of Manhattan that vanishes without trace and a lost city in the heart of the Amazonian jungle. What on Earth? Investigates six more mysteries captured from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Sahara
programme.desc: In 1965, a beautiful 25 mile structure called the Eye of the Sahara was found from space. Its formation is still unknown. Then, a terrifying new weather weapon could be discovered from clouds emanating from an island in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Is Burning
programme.desc: Military analysts are concerned about a possible smoke screen over North Korea. Then, amateur archaeologists have discovered what could be two forgotten pyramids in Egypt via satellite image.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress
programme.desc: Images of earth from space reveal an intimate portrait of human activity; Cities glow bright while the wilderness remains dark; Why the Australian outback is lit up like a series of vast cities.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Satellites spot strange spiral markings in the remote African desert. A weird deadly black blob is threatening the Florida Keys. Something massive found deep beneath the ice of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include desperate signs from lost veterans in Vietnam captured by satellite, a fleet of massive ships stranded in the middle of a vast desert and strange walls stretching vast distances across Northern California.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Exploding Red Ball
programme.desc: A tattooed trainer flexes her muscles against a martial arts master. A benchwarmer in search of a comeback takes aim at a sporty single mom. With $25,000 on the line, only the strong survive The Thunderdome.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Beware The Buckshot
programme.desc: Halfway to the championship and a chance at the $25,000 prize, a new group of players comes up against an array of perilous new dodgeball projectiles. A pro wrestler brings the fury, a mad scientist shows off her ninja skills, and it's USA vs. The UK.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Cursed Lake of Gold
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Buried Truth
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa share the news about the exhumation with a group of Hicks Babies that have questioned whether Dr. Hicks was in fact their biological father. Sallie faces the reality of exhuming her father. The exhumation begins.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Secrets from the Grave
programme.desc: Wendy and her team encounter unexpected challenges with the exhumation. Sallie struggles emotionally with her decision to exhume. After the exhumation, Sallie and the Hicks babies learn the DNA results. Hicks babies are connected with their family.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Dawsyn's settled at home, but it's just a matter of time before the final surgery, and tensions are high. Splitting responsibilities has Karen questioning whether she and Dawsyn are getting the support they need. Meanwhile, GG drops a bomb about Darian.

programme.title: Counting On: Still Growing: From Snow to Sand
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy take advantage of all California has to offer when they take friends on a snow to sand adventure. Back in Arkansas, the guys throw John a Dad-chelor party to welcome him to fatherhood. Then, Joy and Austin share exciting news.

programme.title: Counting On: Jana's Secret Garden
programme.desc: Jana does so much for the family that they want to surprise her with something she's wanted for a long time -- a greenhouse! John, Abbie and baby Gracie keep Jana distracted in Tennessee while the rest of the family hustles to pull off this big surprise.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: For the Love of Dawsyn
programme.desc: Deon worries he'll fall apart if he attends Dawsyn's surgery. Darian opens up to her parents about the challenges of being the oldest of 14 children. Dawsyn's surgery day arrives, and the family prays for a good outcome.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Houston, We Have a Potty Problem

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kiaira and Cortney
programme.desc: Kiaira and Cortney had a baby. The only catch is that Kiaira's never met Cortney nor the baby. Nev and Max are called in to bring her family together, but they worry this could be the greatest manipulation in catfish history.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Felicia

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Kristen
programme.desc: Mike and Kristen met on Facebook but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jamey and Ari

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny and Jamison

programme.title: Chopped: Give It a Nest!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Harvest Party

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Bulk Buys

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboys Who Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is delivering a tailgate lunch to her husband, Ladd, and the cowboys who are out working cattle. She makes Pressure Cooker Pulled Pork Sandwiches and Pickled Jalapenos and Onions for topping them.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Ree Drummond packs a kitchen-equipment care package for her daughter, Alex, working in Dallas. There's a delicious quarter sheet pan supper that's quick to make after a day in the office.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Old-Fashioned Comfort
programme.desc: It's comfort from start to finish, and Ree Drummond's spelling it out in an old-fashioned, feel good way. First, C is for casserole -- tuna noodle casserole, that is. O is for open spaces and the great outdoors.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 14
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is serving up easy, delicious Labor Day eats. There are Crispy Wings with Hot Honey Sauce and spicy Pimento Cheese Grits. For something sweet, Ree makes divine Peach Shortcakes and a refreshing Ginger Cherry Limeade Spritzer.

programme.desc: A woman, who feels neglected and unappreciated by her boyfriend, breaks out of their relationship in an effort to make him miss her. When he misunderstands her intent, war ensues, with both of them refusing to move out of their newly purchased condo.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Not So Silent Night
programme.desc: Shannon is excited about her annual Christmas party, but holiday cheer quickly turns into holiday jeer when the ladies get together.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Not a Good Day in LA
programme.desc: After finally appearing on 'Good Day LA' to promote CUT Fitness, Tamra reveals her real reason for being upset with Heather. Meanwhile, Briana and Ryan surprise Vicki with the gender of their baby.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Skunk in the Barnyard
programme.desc: Shannon finds out that there are rumours going around concerning her marriage, so she heads to Heather's to find out the source of the rumours. Lizzie gets caught in the middle of Shannon and Heather's argument. Meanwhile, Tamra orders a robotic baby.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Making Woo-Hoo-Py!
programme.desc: After being banished from the Dubrow household, Shannon makes a run for the border to join Vicki and Brooks in Puerto Vallarta. Back in the OC, Lizzie tries to balance work and family, and Heather hires a personal chef to free up her time for her family.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: La-Bomb-Ba

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Point 'Break'

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Fully Loaded

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Valentines and Birthday Whines

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Bali Highs and Lows

programme.title: Snapped: Beverly McColm

programme.title: Snapped: Nancy Khan

programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Kill-De-Sac
programme.desc: When a freewheeling family moves from California to the buttoned down enclave of Leesburg, Virginia, they quickly get on the wrong side of their neighbour across the way. The conflict escalates until bullets fly and blood flows in the street.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Landlord, Death Lord
programme.desc: A young couple finds their paradise in a Vancouver, Washington housing development with strict codes of community conduct. But someone forgot to tell their neighbour the rules, and he will resist them at all costs.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighborhood Madhouse
programme.desc: A young family moves to the paradise of Longboat Key Florida, for a better life. But when their psychologist neighbor discovers that the man of the house might be a violent criminal, she vows to protect herself - with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Last Face She Saw
programme.desc: When the most popular pizza restaurant of little Claypool Hill, VA is turned into a horrific crime scene, everybody is stunned. With clues revealing more than robbery, law enforcement know they must move fast to catch the killer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: My Dearest Diary
programme.desc: When Angela and Ashley Hyke go missing one hot summer night and candles are found burning in their home, those close to them know that something is horribly wrong. The key to solving the mystery may lie in Angela's cryptic diary.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Fire in the Desert
programme.desc: When Albuquerque, New Mexico mail carrier Marilyn Gandert disappears for days, no one knows where she could have gone. When her burnt body is found in the desert, detectives must find their murderer with few witnesses beyond Marilyn's family members.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Bloody Footprint
programme.desc: Maurice Goins, a friendly neighbor who provides meals to other tenants in his apartment complex, is found murdered in his bedroom. The case goes cold, until Lakewood, Ohio police suddenly receive a tip and the investigation is thrown into overdrive.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: The L.A. Riots: 25 Years Later
programme.desc: Revisit the historical tensions and racial injustice that led to the L.A. riots of April 29, 1992. A variety of perspectives and voices are presented, and through modern eyes history is shown to parallel current social issues.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched

programme.title: The L.A. Riots: 25 Years Later

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Cuddl Duds: Live in Layers
programme.desc: Warm, cozy layering apparel along with accessories.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lake It or Not?
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Measure of Skill
programme.desc: A couple flips a home in College Park, GA, and thinks the hard part is over because the interior demo is complete. However, when their first project goes awry and their timeline is busted by permit delays, they worry the flip is nothing but a money pit.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mindbending Silver Maple
programme.desc: Inspired by tales of a time long past, Pete builds a treehouse cradled by the stems of a twisty silver maple on the shore of Lake Chelan. The cedar-shingled structure has a curved turret that soars two storeys high and a deck to take in views of the lake.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: In the Pits
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is travelling cross-country celebrating the art of pit cooking. In Michigan, Roger meets up with Andy Shundlich of Epicure Catering, helping cook a classic Italian pig roast in his brick-lined pit.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: New Jersey
programme.desc: Eddie Hall is in the Garden State of New Jersey for the Destination Dogs hot dog challenge. The epic platter pits Eddie against eight supersized hot dogs weighing in at nearly 6 pounds and a jaw-dropping 7,000 calories.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Philadelphia
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man 2017 winner Eddie Hall gets roped into a strength test with legendary boxing coach Buster Custus at a famed Philadelphia gym before he gets a double hit of delicious Philly cheesesteak.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Oakland
programme.desc: Chef Jordan Andino checks out the Bay Area's biggest city, Oakland, California, and makes his first stop at Seawolf Public House for classic comfort foods with international flavors.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Memphis
programme.desc: Jordan Andinio fires up his evening with some Polynesian fare-gone Southern at Atomic Tiki in Memphis, a city known for BBQ and the blues, but there's much more to its late-night food scene.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Macau
programme.desc: Tony plays baccarat with a local legend; kart races with a Macau champion and dives off the world's highest bungee jump.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Alsace
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the famously French and decidedly German cuisine of Alsace, France.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew explores Houston's Tex-Mex fajitas, Czech pastry, and Cajun mashups.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Wake Up Call
programme.desc: The chefs make wicked spicy hot chocolate and peanut butter and banana French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: With My Hands
programme.desc: The chefs talk about dishes that are meant to be eaten with their fingers.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Puppy Problems/ The Mighty Little Dragon
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Frida Fairy Flies Again/ A Tale of Two Dragons
programme.desc: Doc, Emmie and Alma are playing with Alma’s new fairy flier when it gets caught on a branch. Stuffy gets jealous of Carlos’ new robotic dragon toy, Robo-Dragon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Apple / Won't You Be My Puppy
programme.desc: On the morning of the Playcare bake sale, Bob is devastated when he can't make his "Big Apple" pie because he's out of apples. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find their favorite television host's special sweater in time for his show.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Mystery on the Muppet Express / Mister Manny
programme.desc: When Buddy the Bunny goes missing on the Muppet Babies Express, Summer Penguin sets out to find him. Mr. Manny steps in for Miss Nanny when she runs an errand.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Escape From Unwish Island/ The Gland Plan
programme.desc: Timmy's unwished wishes come back for revenge; Cosmo might lose his job as godparent.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chip Off the Old Chip/ Snow Bound
programme.desc: Timmy feels his voice won't work in a school play; Timmy and Vicki end up in an avalanche.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A Boy and His Dog-Boy/ Crock Blocked
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form. Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Mr. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy accidentally releases the crimson chin's arch-villain, all heck breaks loose.

programme.desc: Event planner Olivia gets a great opportunity to organize an event on a luxury cruise. She meets her match in the charming Tony, who is on a trial run as Cruise Director, but they must work together to make the cruise event a hit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: Frasier: The Devil and Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Frasier visits his old friend Dr. Phil, and is shocked to discover who Phil's agent is.

programme.title: Frasier: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles revel in the company of their mother's former research partner.

programme.title: Frasier: Analyzed Kiss
programme.desc: Reeling from her break-up with her accountant, Julia breaks into Frasier's office.

programme.title: Frasier: A New Position for Roz
programme.desc: While preparing to leave KACL for a new job, Roz is concerned about Frasier and Julia.

programme.title: Frasier: No Sex Please, We're Skittish
programme.desc: Though KACL has hired her replacement, Roz is not ready to turn in her headphones.

programme.title: Frasier: A Man, a Plan and a Gal
programme.desc: Daphne and Niles have a dinner party to make an announcement; Frasier faces his fear.

programme.title: Frasier: The Doctor Is Out
programme.desc: Frasier is mistakenly believed to be gay when a caller sees him with Niles in a bar.

programme.title: Frasier: The Babysitter
programme.desc: It's Crane vs. Crane when Frasier and Martin compete for the affections of the same girl.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Person to Person
programme.desc: Ricky's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on 'Person to Person.'

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Goes to a Rodeo
programme.desc: Lucy helps Ricky out by appearing on an amateur rodeo show when Ricky can't make it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Nursery School
programme.desc: Little Ricky ends up in the hospital after Ricky takes him to nursery school.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's European Booking
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking but he can't afford to take Lucy with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include Jon Voight and Rashad Jennings.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Marshall Williams from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'Follow Me to Daisy Hills' and Hallmark Channel's 'Bubbly Sesh' podcast hosts, Jacks and Shawl stop by.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Safari
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet with the head Ranger. Upon learning that the park is in financial jeopardy, and may have to be sold to her uncle's competitor, he urges her to take on a Safari.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A woman burned by a boyfriend on New Year’s escapes on a ski getaway and is snowed in with a handsome entrepreneur.

programme.title: South Park: Dead Celebrities
programme.desc: Ike is being tormented by paranormal forces. Kyle brings in professional ghost hunters to help save his little brother.

programme.title: South Park: 1%
programme.desc: The 99% is ganging up on Cartman.

programme.title: South Park: Royal Pudding
programme.desc: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: South Park: You Have 0 Friends
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to 'friend' him, Stan gets sucked into the world of Facebook. Kyle gets a hard lesson about the politics of Facebook when he friends the least popular kid in school.

programme.title: South Park: Human Cent-iPad
programme.desc: Kyle is intimately involved in the development of a revolutionary new product that is about to be launched by Apple. Meanwhile, Cartman doesn't even have a regular iPad yet, a problem he blames his mother for.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one. When Stan refuses to vote for the ridiculous choices, Puff Daddy shows up and tells him to 'vote or die.'

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
programme.desc: Kyle is on his deathbed with a rare kidney disease. Cartman is found to be the perfect donor, but withholds his kidney until Kyle can pay him 10 million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 16, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 16, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Night of the Living Homeless
programme.desc: Ignoring the homeless in South Park becomes impossible when their numbers become overwhelming and their lust for spare change becomes insatiable. The boys devise a plan to rid the town of homeless once and for all.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: After being shunned by the others kids, Damien, the Son of Satan, calls upon his father to fight Jesus in the ultimate Pay-Per-View Boxing Match between good and evil. Cartman gets upset when the match is held on his birthday.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: Married at First Sight: You Can Get Out of This
programme.desc: Heading into their second week of marriage, five couples adjust to daily life together while also seeking the advice of friends and family they haven't seen since marrying their stranger spouses.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Opening Up is Hard To Do
programme.desc: As the five couples settle into married life, they begin to explore what growing in love means to them. And while one spouse declares their love for their partner, two other spouses make comments that could completely derail their marriages.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Unfiltered: Can the Real Brett Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: Host Jamie Otis sits down with Amani, Olivia and Pastor Cal to discuss the highs and lows of their marriages, including Olivia's struggle to discover the 'real' Brett, and Amani's growing love for Woody.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Dealbreakers
programme.desc: As the headaches of domestic life start to dampen the romance of being married at first sight, the couples question--and, in some cases, test--their relationships.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: An Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: After a rocky dinner with Reese's family, Nonie makes a big decision about their relationship. Things don't go according to plan when Kattie sets up a double date with Kevin and her best friend Natalie.

programme.desc: Beth and Jamie attempt to overcome COVID, AJ and Steph have a lazy Sunday, Danielle's pregnancy cravings put Bobby to work, Jephte's little brother comes to visit, and Jess and Austin reach new heights for their anniversary.
