programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Marquez Family Episode 3
programme.desc: The outside of the house renovations near completion, and our team starts thinking about interior decor for the makeover.

programme.title: The Closer: The Last Word
programme.desc: A young street hustler sees what appears to be a man burying a woman in Griffith Park prompting an investigation Brenda is convinced will lead to Philip Stroh.

programme.title: The Closer: Pilot
programme.desc: The new head of the Priority Murder Squad investigates the murder of an unknown woman.

programme.title: The Closer: About Face
programme.desc: A movie star's wife is found dead; Brenda finds herself rattled trying to get around L.A.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: 65 Hours
programme.desc: On the morning that Jane is about to testify in a murder trial, she discovers that a key piece of evidence was stolen. BPD has three days to resolve the crime, or else the murderer may go free. Frankie learns a few magic tricks to impress Nina.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: For Richer or Poorer
programme.desc: When a forensic accountant is gunned down in a park, Jane and Maura are drawn into a sophisticated Ponzi scheme. Jane discovers that her prime suspect is someone from Maura's past. Jane also makes a life-changing career decision.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Stiffed
programme.desc: A mortician's body is discovered in one of his own funeral home's caskets, leading the team into the world of embalming, interment and ultimately serial murder. Tommy visits with his son TJ and considers returning to Boston for good.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Will Follow You Into the Dark
programme.desc: After learning at a deposition that more of his patients have died than survived, Derek decides to quit. While Bailey and the Chief continue to bicker over her peds fellowship, Izzie's interns discover something unsettling about Patient X.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Stand by Me
programme.desc: After his fellow surgeons try and fail to bring Derek back to work, it falls to Meredith to convince Derek to return to Seattle Grace. Meanwhile, Mark attempts a difficult facial transplant and Cristina gets her first solo surgery.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Elevator Love Letter
programme.desc: All eyes are on Derek as he is set to perform his first surgery after his breakdown. Meanwhile, Izzie's medical condition requires her to undergo a difficult surgery and Owen has another PTSD episode that injures Cristina and traumatizes them both.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur
programme.desc: Josh scours England, Wales, and Scotland to find the real life King Arthur.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Real Robin Hood
programme.desc: Josh criss-crosses the English countryside in search of the real Robin Hood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: England's Vanished Crown Jewels
programme.desc: Josh goes on a quest to find the legendary lost treasure of King John. He explores the deadly marshlands of England to find the despised king's crown jewels, which were swept away in a freak tidal surge in the 13th century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: A Spot of Josh
programme.desc: Josh goes on an Anglophile adventure as he travels (virtually) across the pond to interview celebrity royalty and dig deeper into British culture and history. Guests include: John Cleese, Lucy Davis, and Ed Stafford.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Hammer Time
programme.desc: A rocket scientist, a social media guru and the Lebron James of Dodgeball compete for one of the final spots in the championship round. Twists and turns on the course abound, including a mighty new weapon that will make even the God of Thunder tremble!

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Beware The Buckshot
programme.desc: Halfway to the championship and a chance at the $25,000 prize, a new group of players comes up against an array of perilous new dodgeball projectiles. A pro wrestler brings the fury, a mad scientist shows off her ninja skills, and it's USA vs. The UK.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: Saga loses a veteran deckhand, forcing Jake to steam a greenhorn army to the Russian line. Amid scuttlebutt that ports are closing due to a virus, Josh fights to get home for a reunion with his brother and Sig's daughter gets rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: A Spot of Josh

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Beware The Buckshot

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: Saga loses a veteran deckhand, forcing Jake to steam a greenhorn army to the Russian line. Amid scuttlebutt that ports are closing due to a virus, Josh fights to get home for a reunion with his brother and Sig's daughter gets rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Beginning of the End?
programme.desc: The crew of the Infinity is in the Marshall Islands preparing for one of the most dangerous expeditions known to man: sailing farther north than any sail ship ever has. If they don't leave in time, they risk being locked in arctic ice for ten months.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: The Infinity crew is on its way to Dutch Harbor and a brewing storm system threatens to put them through their first real test. They stop in an atoll to get the boat storm-ready but they quickly find themselves anchored in an area littered with bombs.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: No Turning Back
programme.desc: After crossing the North Pacific, the Infinity arrives in Dutch Harbor. Unprepared for the arctic, the crew uses this opportunity to stock up on supplies and ready the boat before making their way into the mouth of the treacherous North West Passage.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: The crew of Infinity enters the Arctic Circle, where they encounter a brutal storm and their first ice. As they push toward the next safe harbor, they run aground in dangerously shallow waters with a wall of ice closing in on them.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Tempers get hot when survival tactics collide as Joe and Cody struggle to escape the Nicaraguan jungle.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: Isolated beneath the mountains of Romania, lost in a labyrinth of underground caves, Joe and Cody fight to escape the pitch black darkness with dying headlamps.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Misty Mountain Drop

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Night Shift
programme.desc: College student Brad Perry showed up to work his graveyard shift at the gas station and was never seen alive again.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Shannon Siders' body was found in the woods, nearly everyone in the small town of Newaygo, Michigan, becomes a suspect. It takes 22 years for a special cold case unit to solve the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Cursed
programme.desc: One family faces two unsolved murders of their loved ones. It takes 13 years for detectives to uncover the one missing clue that can lead them to the killer: the hidden crime scene.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killings on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A family torn apart by their grandparents' murders. Two decades later, a cold case detective takes on the case that's haunted him since he was a child. When he breaks the case, he must race to solve it before the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: She Never Came Home
programme.desc: The case of a gruesome stabbing death of a bullied teenager remains unsolved for 27 years--until a rookie cold case detective sees a new clue in an old crime scene photo.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Secret
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl goes missing in a small Kentucky town. Two weeks later, she is found strangled in the woods.

programme.title: The First 48: Division/ Loose Ends
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the death of a 24-year-old father-of-two shot in the street; detectives are called to the murder of a 27-year-old man found in an open field.

programme.title: The First 48: Blind Rage/ Those Closest To Us
programme.desc: Detectives race against the clock to catch the killer of a homeless man who was found stabbed in a park and was last seen alive with a one-legged friend.

programme.title: The First 48: Terribly Wrong/ Settling the Score
programme.desc: In Charlotte, a man shoots a store clerk and father of three children in a robbery.

programme.title: The First 48: A Killer Fight/ Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: In Mobile, a street fight escalates to a shooting that leaves a man dead in his front yard. In Tulsa, a drive-by shooting that stems from a gang feud claims the life of a 16-year-old girl, while her boyfriend clings to life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: The Misery Index: The Grandma's Special
programme.desc: They may be senior citizens but these awesome ladies sure have lived! Find out what happens when a young bull charges you, and what bodily function made a girl lose 10 years of memories.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Send in the Clowns
programme.desc: See a moped crash that'd make Wylie Coyote proud, a big family surprise for one Tenderloin, and Murr makes a very bad bet.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: What Is Woke?
programme.desc: Thomas Dale puts a spell on Damien, Ali Kolbert knows what Thomas does to relax, and Matthew Broussard reveals Ali's favorite board game.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Surprisingly Doughy
programme.desc: Find out why Julian McCullough wants to build a wall, what Jade Catta-Preta thinks about Julian's midsection, and which celebrity Matteo Lane knows all about.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Women Are Trending
programme.desc: Find out what Jessimae Peluso does in a confessional, what new magical STD Josh Wolf creates, and what Amir K says to make Jessimae walk off stage.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: America's Least Wanted
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau knows exactly what millennials say, Cipha Sounds has a surprising favorite dance move, and Shane Torres explains what makes Cipha different from other DJs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truth or Chair
programme.desc: Todd moves his mother to Nashville, but her belongings take over his pristine home. Meanwhile, Chase insists that his dad take a lie detector test after he catches wind of his father's penchant for lying.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rent Controlled
programme.desc: Todd offers to help Savannah purchase a home, but there are strings attached. Meanwhile, Grayson's monthly phone bill gets him in hot water with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The House That Todd Built
programme.desc: Todd signs the family up with a local charity in order to teach the kids about giving back to the community. Grayson's school project causes a rift between Todd and Faye over their heritage.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye
programme.desc: Nanny Faye joins the world of online dating. When Todd gets wind of it, he makes himself her chaperone. Meanwhile, new homeowners Chase and Savannah compete for Todd's handouts to furnish their homes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Client-Hell
programme.desc: Savannah agrees to manage Todd's singing career for a school project and unwittingly unleashes his inner diva. Meanwhile, Chase struggles to throw a dinner for the family to prove he can outdo Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bunions, Bulldogs and Hedgehogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: Todd thinks taking over Julie's housework while she recovers from surgery will be a cakewalk, but running the home isn't as easy as it looks. Chase schemes with Nanny Faye to get Todd to accept his dog, Lilo.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Market Crash
programme.desc: Chase accepts Todd's Challenge to market the juice bar, but quickly realizes that selling juice is hard. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie fret about Savannah, who's convalescing at the family home after a bad car wreck.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mannequin Challenge
programme.desc: Savannah struggles with a project for her clothing line. Chase gets an ultimatum from Todd about getting Lilo's behaviour under control.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: O Grayson, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's plans for a peaceful weekend go awry. Chase tries to spend some bonding time with Grayson, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Matchmakers and Batchbakers
programme.desc: Todd and Julie try to find Savannah the perfect match when she jumps back into the dating pool. Meanwhile, Grayson enters a baking contest.

programme.title: The Soup
programme.desc: If an event is big enough for water-cooler consciousness, it's certain to be on The Soup.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Booty Shakes and Whipped Cream
programme.desc: Kelly Osbourne and Jack Osbourne, Loni Love and James Welsh, and Erin Andrews and Jarret Stoll compete remotely from their homes in a night of fun and games.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Celebrity Clip Face and Kazoo
programme.desc: Tracee Ellis Ross and Evan Ross, Meghan Trainor and Ryan Trainor and Andy Roddick and Brooklyn Decker compete remotely from their own homes in a night of fun and games hosted by Kevin Hart.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know: Oprah Winfrey
programme.desc: The most unbelievable, surprising, and OMG things about Oprah Winfrey from how she got her Oscar nomination to how she and Gayle really became BFFs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Erika Jayne dishes on all the drama on 'The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills.'

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Not Going to Budge-It!

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Figure in the Garage

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Baltimore Street Disaster
programme.desc: Life on the streets in Baltimore becomes unexpectedly dangerous when a stretch of city road suddenly collapses and forces residents from their homes, leaving experts racing to come up with an engineering rescue.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Monsters of the Arctic
programme.desc: When melting ice threatens to flood a town, an amphibious mega machine saves the day.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Roller Coaster 911
programme.desc: When the world's oldest roller coaster breaks at the worst possible moment, skilled engineers and technicians race against the clock to investigate what went wrong and how to fix it before it's opened to the public.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Surprise Impalements
programme.desc: Paramedics and airborne doctors of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance fly to the rescue of a motorcyclist who was thrown from his bike and impaled on a tree. Also, the team is called to treat a farmer who is seriously injured by his own cowherd.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Monsters of the Arctic
programme.desc: When melting ice threatens to flood a town, an amphibious mega machine saves the day.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Roller Coaster 911
programme.desc: When the world's oldest roller coaster breaks at the worst possible moment, skilled engineers and technicians race against the clock to investigate what went wrong and how to fix it before it's opened to the public.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Surprise Impalements
programme.desc: Paramedics and airborne doctors of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance fly to the rescue of a motorcyclist who was thrown from his bike and impaled on a tree. Also, the team is called to treat a farmer who is seriously injured by his own cowherd.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Hell Tower NYC
programme.desc: A New York City skyscraper that could topple at any moment, a city street that suddenly collapses, and a modern-day crisis at Pisa's Leaning Tower are serious engineering emergencies, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost of Zorro
programme.desc: A giant letter Z is carved into a Mexican hillside, evoking the mark of a legendary outlaw. A strange sighting in Germany points to secrets from the Cold War. Massive, blood-red marks in China prompt fears of a violent government crackdown.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: A strange mass breaches the surface of an ocean near Antarctica, sparking rumors of a mythological sea monster. An area of the US-Mexico border becomes an international mystery. Ancient rock carvings in a mountain range depict weird, unearthly beings.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Satan in Siberia
programme.desc: A satanic symbol points to an army of the dead in Siberia. A massive stone giant's in a remote desert. Evidence of a Russian doomsday device is right on America's doorstep. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Desert Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Hundreds of shipwrecks are found in the middle of a desert in Africa. Then, visit a ghost town where hundreds of its inhabitants have mysteriously died. Also, something strange happens in North Korea.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Down by Fire
programme.desc: Ryne Zahner is an inspiration to his high school math students in Arizona. His friends see him as one of the nicest people they know. When a hooded murderer guns him down after a night of partying, the entire community struggles to grasp his murder.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: See No Evil: All That It Seems
programme.desc: A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, produces one casualty.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Snatched
programme.desc: A young woman walks home after a family gathering. Another young woman goes out to get cold medicine. Then, with no warning, danger strikes, and both women are kidnapped. But both brave victims outsmart their attackers.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Bold Moves
programme.desc: A gunfight erupts when a mother and daughter are forced to defend their business from an armed robber. And then, a man who tries to rob a martial arts instructor quickly realizes he has messed with the wrong person.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Predators Among Us
programme.desc: Infamous sex abuse sports doctor attacked by angry parent; a gang member, a snitch and the F.B.I. collide; defiant defendant curses out judge; murderer taunts mother of two teenage sons; singing for a lenient sentence; prisoner meets his baby in court.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Snatched
programme.desc: A young woman walks home after a family gathering. Another young woman goes out to get cold medicine. Then, with no warning, danger strikes, and both women are kidnapped. But both brave victims outsmart their attackers.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Bold Moves
programme.desc: A gunfight erupts when a mother and daughter are forced to defend their business from an armed robber. And then, a man who tries to rob a martial arts instructor quickly realizes he has messed with the wrong person.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Predators Among Us
programme.desc: Infamous sex abuse sports doctor attacked by angry parent; a gang member, a snitch and the F.B.I. collide; defiant defendant curses out judge; murderer taunts mother of two teenage sons; singing for a lenient sentence; prisoner meets his baby in court.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Family Business
programme.desc: An armored truck driver and his family commit a series of heists, eluding authorities for over a decade. But when one of them starts flashing the cash, their plan for living the good life begins to crumble.

programme.title: See No Evil: Call Me Back, Chris
programme.desc: In February 2008, Christopher Duncan left his apartment in San Antonio Texas, never to return again. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage has the potential to reveal the identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Dying for Love
programme.desc: Misook longs for a mother figure in her life having grown up without one. When she meets Don Wang and they fall in love, she gets a husband and a mother in law she adores in Linda.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Love, Greed and Murder
programme.desc: Patricia Siler thinks she's married into a family of wealth and status when she weds Tom Allanson. But when Tom is disinherited, Pat's dreams are dashed and two generations of in-laws find themselves victim of her deadly wrath.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: Identical twins Yvette and Doris Gay are a close-knit pair, but when they meet Renwick Gibbs, their quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome. And soon they with devise a murderous scheme that will change one innocent family's life forever.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Folie Aux Deux
programme.desc: The Hopkins sisters seem to have the perfect life, but under the surface lurks a disease that will lead them down a path of destruction. When they begin to feel a man from their past is after them, they'll do whatever it takes to protect their family.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Born to Sin
programme.desc: Adopted twins Peter and Michael Versluys are raised in a loving home. As time goes by, however, the boys reveal their inner dark side and their lives become full of failure and deceit. Ultimately, their twisted bond exposes the evil that lies within.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Million Dollar Christy
programme.desc: A female boxing Phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when another secret passion bubbles to the surface and she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Two married church volunteers put their faith and families on the line for an affair that leads to expulsion from their church and community.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A teen girl with big ambitions of becoming a cop falls hard for the charm of an NYPD officer. He promises to make all her dreams come true but when affairs of the heart are complicated by the letter of the law.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Together Forever, Forever Together
programme.desc: A young teen forbidden to date falls in love with a senior at her high school. The two go to extreme lengths to keep their relationship secret but when it is threatened with exposure they vow to stay together, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Therapy on Ice
programme.desc: When violin prodigy Lia Tricomo seeks the help of therapist John Alkins, they connect over a shared love of music. When John finds it impossible to resist his troubled patient, the consequences of indulging his forbidden passion will prove deadly.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A landscaper that has an obsession for his client won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Campaign Trail of Fears
programme.desc: A Texas politician and his wife are stalked by their private pilot, who will stop at nothing to destroy them.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Friend Request
programme.desc: When single mom Rosita accepts a stranger's friend request, she has no idea he's hiding a terrifying secret that will lead to a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: First Time Builders
programme.desc: Mistakes will be made but if these novice builders can pull it off, the results will be truly rewarding!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Caribbean Spa
programme.desc: With three energetic kids and lots of friends, a family needs a pool to keep everyone entertained. They create a masterpiece that includes a huge deck for Dad, a Baja shelf for Mom and multiple water features.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cancun in Every Corner
programme.desc: The kings pull out all the stops to maximize an Orange County family's backyard. The shady and dated space is transformed into a three-tiered vacation paradise the family can enjoy at home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Tiers
programme.desc: A Texas couple building their dream home wants a pool with one-of-a-kind architecture that's also kid-friendly for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Rockin' Out In Music City
programme.desc: A Nashville family hopes to make a big splash with a new resort-style swimming pool in their backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime Bbq

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Chef Goofy on the Go!

programme.title: Chuggington: The Extra Mile/ Wilson's Broadcast Blues

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pluto and the Pup / Trouble at Floochi's!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Giganto's Laugh/ Treasure!
programme.desc: Tiny and Mazu treat Giganto's toothache.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Holiday in Hot Dog Hills / Happy Kitty Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and friends go on adventures around Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Puppet Show/ The Mystery of the New Kid
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku go undercover as puppets so they can help Mira catch a pickpocket. When a new kid in town is blamed for stealing an earring, Mira must figure out if he's guilty.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Lambie Gets the Linties/ Moo-Moo's Tutu Boo Boo
programme.desc: Doc must help Lambie remove the lint from her plush in time for her to be a part of Professor Hootsburgh's plush portrait painting. Then, Moo-Moo accidentally gets ripped when she's left at Doc's house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun

programme.title: Amanpour and Company

programme.title: Hacking Your Mind: Weapons of Influence
programme.desc: See how politicians, social media companies and corporate marketers use big data to hack your auto-pilot decision making system and learn how to defend yourself.

programme.title: Islands of Wonder: Madagascar

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Rocky Rescue/ Canoe Journey

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Fossa Palooza

programme.title: Hero Elementary: A Leg Up/ Sneezitis Solution
programme.desc: When a baby porcupine gets itself into predicaments, it's Sparks' Crew to the rescue. But, how do they help the little porcupine when they can't get too close to it?

programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.desc: George sells lemonade to buy a new soccer ball and causes problems after he adjusts a traffic light.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Margaret's First Chime Time/ Tiger Family Fun
programme.desc: The Tiger Family is taking Margaret to the Clock Factory for her very first 'Chime Time.'

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Tiny Blue Dot/ Earth Camping
programme.desc: A rollicking, song-filled recap of the Propulsion family's mission to Earth is showcased.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: The House That Ants Built/ Special Places
programme.desc: Elinor and her friends are trying to make an awesome couch cushion castle, but they each have their own ideas of how to build it. When Ari can't find his favorite ball, Mr. Dog explains how he buries things to keep them safe in their 'special place.'

programme.desc: This award-winning children's series provides education and enrichment for preschoolers.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Invisible Ink/ Rusty's Doghouse
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Pinkalicious and her brother Peter.

programme.desc: A lovable, oversized canine, Clifford, emphasizes good citizenship and community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Murder in the Mountains

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: The stories of a serial rapist in Nebraska and two brothers of 'The LA Boyz' gang thought to be in hiding in Mexico.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Point Blank Murder

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fighting for Life

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Rugged Road Home
programme.desc: Marty embarks on a dangerous self-shot mission to carve a road up 300-foot cliffs. With their chickens growing, Misty enlists her family to build a predator-proof coop from scratch.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flaming Farm Fixes
programme.desc: The Raneys face the fire as they fireproof an Idaho homestead and create an evacuation ark for livestock in danger of California wildfires. Raney ingenuity then creates the first-ever automated homestead for firefighters in Alaska.

programme.title: Moonshiners: White Lightning Wars
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff feel the heat as the law closes in. Tim's plan to give a backwoods makeover to Troy's distillery will cost him big. The law cracks down on Josh and Bill. Tickle flirts with disaster as he tries to sell his Kentucky made white lightning.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Liquid Assets
programme.desc: Tickle has his hands full keeping track of his liquor and Chico and Tyler are becoming suspicious. Bill and Josh build an underground bunker to hide their shine. Tennessee shiners, Mark and Digger, test an invention that could revolutionize moonshining.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shine Jacked
programme.desc: The law is on the prowl. Moonshiners are going to extremes to protect themselves and their shine. Josh and Bill secure an underground stash spot with some serious horsepower, and Mark, Jeff, and Lance decide to bootleg this season's haul off-road.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine River
programme.desc: Josh and Bill go for broke on a triple batch run. Tickle sacrifices his own livelihood to save his partnership. Tim is ready to see once and for all if the Asheville distillery can produce his Climax Moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shine Overboard
programme.desc: The final weeks of shine season are here. Josh and Bill's liquor gets stuck six feet under. Chico and Tyler brew a sweet and sticky moonshine game-changer. Tickle gets trumped by his old buddy and Mark and Jeff's first sale on the water ends in disaster.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bootleg or Bust
programme.desc: Josh and Bill go into the water business to secretly sell their shine. Tim returns to Virginia to fill a huge last-minute order. Mark takes a second shot at delivering his liquor by boat. Tickle's deal with a moonshine saviour almost breaks down.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bros Before Hooch
programme.desc: Tickle's loyalty is tested as he risks it all to stay true to his old partner, Tim. Josh and Bill decide to make one last run in the woods but soon discover that they're not alone. Mark and Digger's season is in danger after their bootleg deal backfires.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Shining
programme.desc: It's last call in shine country. Deputy Chuck takes to the water to catch Mark red-handed. Tim and Tickle work together to make a rush delivery of 2,000 cases of liquor in their home state. The cops close in on Josh and Bill with shocking consequences.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country
programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Rogue Rage
programme.desc: The newly-formed group desperately hunts for moose. When Oliver refuses to go along with the plan and is an obstacle in the line of fire, Andrew pushes back. Army veteran Adam arrives at base camp and immediately tackles critical building projects.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Winter Scramble
programme.desc: Andrew and Gerrid celebrate a victorious moose hunt but a disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. A cold spell has everyone scrambling to build shelters and tensions between Oliver and the rest of the group reach explosive new heights.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Mystery Blisters: Diagnosis Unknown
programme.desc: Fun-loving Che'Re has a squishy, dark bump on her cheek that has left her depressed and self-conscious. Buck has been breaking out in painful, fluid-filled blisters for three years. Telly developed a massive bump behind his head after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: A Growth to Remember

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Video Chat, Pop, Splat

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Drew Peterson

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Happy Face Killer: Keith Hunter Jesperson
programme.desc: Melissa Moore, daughter of Keith Hunter Jesperson, infamously known as the 'Happy Face Killer,' tells her story as the daughter of a serial killer. She shares what it was like growing up with a father who, she later learned, was committing murders.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Classified Ad Rapist: Bobby Joe Long
programme.desc: Cindy Brown reveals how her childhood sweetheart and husband, Bobby Joe Long, evolves into a fiend who rapes more than 50 women, ultimately killing ten. Their son Chris, talks on camera for the first time, revealing his struggle as a killer's child.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Killer Clown: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: Karen Kuzma, sister of John Wayne Gacy, comes out of the shadows to reveal intimate details of one of the world's most notorious serial killers. Joined by her daughter, Karen returns to her childhood home in Chicago to disclose formative events.

programme.title: The First 48: The Slip/ Pure Victim
programme.desc: In Detroit, detectives investigate the double-homicide of two 26-year-olds, shot execution-style in the basement. In Harris County, a 79-year-old woman is shot and killed while unloading items from her car.

programme.title: The First 48: Memphis Blues/ Widow Maker
programme.desc: An elderly man is found duct-taped and beaten to death outside his house as his wife of 40 years is asleep inside.

programme.title: The First 48: Down a Dark Hallway
programme.desc: In Tulsa, detectives struggle to find a lead when a beloved grandfather is gunned down in his own home.

programme.title: The First 48: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: In Rochester, a man from a neighboring suburb is found shot to death on a city street.

programme.title: The First 48: Bloodline
programme.desc: When a former Marine is gunned down trying to recover his stolen bicycle, Tulsa detective Matt Frazier goes on the hunt for an elusive criminal family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Kim reveals she no longer wants to host the annual Christmas Eve Party, the family feuds over holiday plans. Scott struggles to talk about his parents when reunited with a relative from his past. Khloe fills in as Kris' assistant and tension rises.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: An International Affair
programme.desc: Ted Allen and Amanda Freitag stop by the arena with one goal in mind: Beat Bobby Flay. Italian-born chef Patrick D'Andrea takes on Canadian chef Rob Feenie for the chance to stare down the master.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Che-Sing Glory
programme.desc: Saturday Night Live's Michael Che and Geoffrey Zakarian from the Food Network are hoping to see their competitor's win against Bobby Flay as they bring out the Columbian flair along with some Asian fusion. Chef Andres Dangond and Tony Nguyen compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Next Food Network Star Is...
programme.desc: Food Network Star is in the house as Alton Brown enlists past season winners Damaris Phillips and Justin Warner to give Mr. Flay the run-around in his own kitchen. The tables might be turned, but the stakes are as high as ever!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF: Beat my Best Friend
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon enlists his pal, TV host Clinton Kelly, to distract Bobby Flay with their friendship. They get additional help from a French master, Chef Sylvain Delpique, and an Italian bread master, Chef Jackie Mazza.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Revenge Is Best Served Bold
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's former co-worker Leia Gaccione and Asian expert Tony Nguyen are back for more, returning to the arena for a second chance to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Queen Returns
programme.desc: Culinary queen Martha Stewart returns with Iron Chef Michael Symon to defeat Bobby Flay. They bring in two young guns, brunch queen Sarah Wade and sous chef Max Castro, to see if Bobby can keep up with the future food generation.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It Must've Been Love
programme.desc: Proving that couples can be competitive, Chef Ricardo Castro and his wife, Chef Rosana Rivera, challenge each other for a chance to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Power of Jane
programme.desc: Actress Jane Krakowski teams up with Chef Michael Symon to steal Bobby Flay's spotlight. They bring in no-nonsense chefs Attila Bollok from Los Angeles and Matthew Spinner from Cleveland to give Bobby an early curtain call.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fey vs. Flay
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli shows Bobby Flay no mercy with fellow mean girl, the hilarious and talented actress Tina Fey. They bring in two more mean girls, celebrity chef Alexcia Smith and former stuntwoman-turned-chef Asia Mei.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's Gonna Be Jarring
programme.desc: Style expert Carson Kressley teams up with Chef Anne Burrell to point out Bobby Flay's fashion and food faux pas. Two Italian authorities, chefs Kevin Sweeney and Nicco Muratore, are ready to prove that their food is trendsetting.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's Gonna Be a Late Night
programme.desc: The star of Late Night with Seth Meyers joins Iron Chef Michael Symon to remind Bobby he's not the only one with his name on a show.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Stealing the Spotlight
programme.desc: Legendary Chef Ina Garten brings along Tony Award-winning Laura Benanti to steal Bobby Flay's spotlight.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: This Just In!
programme.desc: News anchor Don Lemon and Chef Alex Guarnaschelli have a news flash: Bobby Flay is going down! They bring in two award-winning chefs, Dieter Samijn of Bar Boulud and Patrick Schaeffer of Citi Field.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rules are Meant to be Broken

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Spitting Cobras of the World

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Dangerous Africans
programme.desc: Steve travels through Africa on foot to study some of the most notoriously dangerous African animals. He is charged by huge elephants, rolls up to a massive herd of buffalo, intimidates a pride of lions and is chased by large hippos.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Outlaws of the Outback

programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Unicorn and the Wolf
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest treks through the world's largest cave searching for the Saola in a hidden oasis. Then, he heads home to California in search of the Southern Rocky Mountain wolf which hasn't been seen in almost 80 years.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Southern Rocky Mountain Wolf

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: High Voltage Killers

programme.desc: Prof. Oglevee is thrilled with jury duty, until he realizes he'll be serving with Nikki.

programme.desc: Hilary is in a jam after embellishing her resume, then landing a catering job that's more than she can handle.
