programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.desc: Nikki tries to save Prof. Oglevee from Paris and copes with Kim leaving for Harvard.

programme.desc: While Dre and Bow take Zoey on a trip to visit Bow's alma mater, Brown University, Dre battles with his fear of flying through a little pharmaceutical assistance to get him through the flight.

programme.title: Black-ish: Chop Shop
programme.desc: While Bow prepares for the Johnson family's annual Christmas card shoot, Dre takes Junior and Jack to the Barber Shop to get a haircut from his lifelong Barber, T.

programme.title: Black-ish: Man at Work

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing
programme.desc: Dre's childhood best friend Gigi Franklin is in town, and Bow feels like an afterthought whenever the two of them are together. Dre and Gigi are like brother and sister, but it doesn’t help that Gigi is an international pop star with model looks.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Keeping Up With the Johnsons
programme.desc: After a month of heavy spending, Dre and Bow start to question if they are living too large and try to become more financially responsible.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.desc: Flight 107 from Buffalo arrives with no passengers, luggage or crewmembers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Thirty Fathom Grave
programme.desc: A U.S. Navy destroyer picks up strange sounds coming from a sunken submarine ship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fugitive
programme.desc: An elderly man from another planet is pursued by another from his home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Chris and Ruth Miller are frightened to realize their daughter is missing from her bedroom. Although they cannot physically see her, they can hear her cries for help and contact a physicist friend, Bill.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: What's Eating Gilbert Grissom?
programme.desc: Grissom is haunted by the return of the blue paint killer who got away two years ago.

programme.desc: Grissom works with a new agent on the murder and kidnapping of two high school students.

programme.desc: Revived by an underwater electrical cable, Jason Voorhees lays waste to a cruise ship full of traveling teenagers on their way to New York to celebrate their high school graduation.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VII: The New Blood
programme.desc: A traumatized teenager with telekinetic abilities accidentally resurrects Jason while she vacations at Crystal Lake.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VI: Jason Lives
programme.desc: Tommy Jarvis tries to destroy Jason's remains but accidentally resurrects him. Authorities in Crystal Lake, now renamed 'Forest Green' to distance themselves from Jason's past killing sprees, refuse to take Tommy seriously when Jason returns to town.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete, and they need to figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Additional Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, CA, with tons of potential. To justify their investment, they decide to add a bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Million-Dollar Cookie Cutter
programme.desc: Tarek tackles a cookie-cutter home in Newport Beach, CA, where everything looks exactly the same.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Unpermitted Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, CA, that's jam-packed with issues. There's a large pool in a small backyard, and unexpected additions create problems they've never seen before.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Bankrupt Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, CA. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flea Bag Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in Rowland Heights, CA. This three-bedroom, two-bath house should be a quick flip, but once they get inside they find big problems that will take all their skills to fix.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Master Class: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: Tarek coaches a timid 19-year-old through his first $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Master Class: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: The business between contractor and real estate agent brothers' is a flop due to opposing priorities. Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: A couple buys a small home in Sylmar, CA, in hopes of finishing quickly and turning a modest profit. On top of a cracked foundation and failing retaining wall, he's willing to take risks that she is not, so Tarek steps in to get them through the project.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Master Class: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple calls on Tarek El Moussa when a shared driveway and loan stress complicate their flip.

programme.title: House Hunters: Vying for Vintage in Asheville
programme.desc: A therapist and her newlywed husband clash when searching for their first home in Asheville, North Carolina. She's looking for a newer Craftsman-style home that's move-in ready, but he likes older houses and welcomes renovation projects.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Move, Dance and Connect in Mexico
programme.desc: After a health scare, a single woman decides to pursue a passion project in Merida, Mexico. She's looking for a traditional, Colonial-style residence with two bedrooms for visiting family and friends, but her budget expectations may present a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Downsizing in Tennessee
programme.desc: A married couple is looking to move from their large, urban house in Virginia to a simpler existence and smaller place in his home state of Tennessee. They soon find that their strict budget isn't lining up with a lot of demands.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bocas del Toro Blogosphere
programme.desc: After falling in love in Bocas del Toro, Panama, an American couple started an around-the-world journey and created a blog to capture their adventures. Now, they want to purchase a home in the place where they met so they can rest between trips.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Mid-century Miss
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a midcentury house in La Habra, California, that is towards the top of a hill. The margin is tight on this home so they need to get in and out quickly to maximize profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Poolside Potential
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home in Whittier, California, oozing with summertime potential. Its large pool and hardscaped backyard have seen better days, but with the right touch, could become an entertainer's oasis once again.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pooling Value
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina know they can make money on this flip, but the comparable sales indicate that an amazing backyard with a pool could bring even more profit in this family community.

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: Honey, We're Home!

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: Here's the Second Story

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: Orange You Glad It's Avocado?

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: A Sunshine Day on Clinton Way
programme.desc: Barry Williams joins Lara Spencer and Jasmine Roth to recreate his attic bedroom, but in a very unexpected part of the house. Also, Jasmine pulls double duty working on Mike and Carol Brady's master bedroom with Mike Lookinland.

programme.desc: Newlyweds Nora and Diego live with Diego's parents and grandmother in their single-level home in Richmond. The house has plenty of room, but the big foodies family feels cramped during weekday meals and large family gatherings.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Everyone's Welcome
programme.desc: A couple's home used to be the entertainment hub for their friends, but the addition of their daughter makes it feel like a children's play palace. Drew and Jonathan rework the space to create a home that's perfect for entertaining and raising a family.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Changing It Up for Teenagers
programme.desc: A single mom's house lacks space for teenage hangouts and family baking sessions. Jonathan and Drew tackle the living room, dining room and kitchen to give the trio a home where all of their family and friends can hang out in comfort and style.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Hammer, Hammer, Pedal, Pedal
programme.desc: A family's entire life revolves around cycling, but their house is cramped and doesn't support their active lifestyle. Drew and Jonathan take on the challenge of transforming the house into a forever home that works both on and off a bicycle.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Ripley's Believe It or Not
programme.desc: Zak and the crew head to Hollywood, CA, to investigate the iconic Ripley's Believe It or Not museum, where employees claim to be adversely affected by its rare artifacts.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Albion Castle
programme.desc: Zak and the crew are in San Francisco investigating a mysterious castle built on top of sacred caverns said to be a haunted by a female apparition. The current owners claim to be plagued by paranormal activity in almost every corner of the property.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Pasadena Ritual House

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: A Haunting in Scottsdale
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate an Arizona home sitting on land once occupied by a Native American tribe. The owner claims he's been affected by a dark, aggressive energy and believes an ancient entity is haunting his property.

programme.desc: Ozzy and Sharon Osbourne watch Jack and Katrina explore the terrifying Shanghai Tunnels in Portland, OR. While maintaining social distance practices, Jack joins his parents remotely as they unleash a torrent of funny, curious and random one-liners.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Fairies Wear Boots
programme.desc: Jack has his parents questioning the existence of fairies, lizard people, and if ghosts can swim. The family debates if the spirit of a dead soldier can still live within the head of a ventriloquist.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Crazy Babies
programme.desc: Jack Osbourne pushes his parents to believe using video evidence of the unbelievable alien abductions, spirit board antics, poltergeist shenanigans and the monster of Lough Foyle.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Believer

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: See You On the Other Side

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Bark at the Moon

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Breaking All the Rules

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Back on Earth
programme.desc: This week, Jack, Ozzy and Sharon watch some undeniably odd videos of UFOs, giant cryptids, and curious ghosts who decide to pay a visit back on earth. Ozzy is convinced his and Sharon's house is haunted.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Mi Chiamo Kim
programme.desc: The business part of the Biermanns' trip begins as Kim arrives at Cosmoprof in search of the best packaging for her skincare line. Guilio takes them on a tour of Florence as Kim struggles to plan a vow renewal proposal for Kroy.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Pigeons, Piazzas, Proposal
programme.desc: Kim, Kroy and the 'originals' are through with business and now it's all pleasure in Italy. Brielle and Ariana joy ride the canals, while Kim attempts to propose a vow renewal to Kroy on a wobbly gondola.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Wigs, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: Brielle's baseball beau keeps asking her to move in with him, making her wonder if it's time to finally flee the Biermann coop. Meanwhile, Kim and Kroy grow wary of Tracey's white lies, putting her outrageous stories to the test with a polygraph.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: How to Baseball
programme.desc: Kroy dishes out more discipline to Ariana, his already-grounded teenage daughter. Brielle is determined to learn 'how to baseball' to impress her Major League-bound boyfriend. Kim and Kroy play private investigator and tail Tracey home.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Brielle Throws a Curveball
programme.desc: Kim can't cope with Chef Tracey's feline roommates during a hilarious home makeover. Ariana learns the perils of parallel parking in her first driving lesson. Brielle tries to convince Kim and Kroy that she should move in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: One Door Closes, Another One Opens
programme.desc: Kroy calls foul on Brielle's plan to move in with Michael, and challenges her to be more than a live-in girlfriend. Ariana's quest for freedom kicks into full gear as she pursues her learner's permit.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: The Incident
programme.desc: Kash is bitten by a dog, and Kim and Kroy must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: As Kash recovers from the incident with Sinn, the Biermanns hit the road to cheer on Brielle's boyfriend as he pitches for the Birmingham Barons. The Biermanns meet their potential in-laws, the Kopechs, and off-the-field drama ensues.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Sinn, You've Been Gone
programme.desc: Kash continues to recover from his dog bite. Brielle celebrates her one year anniversary and pursues a new career path. Kim and Kroy decide whether or not to bring Sinn back home.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Beach Please
programme.desc: Kim offers her estranged parents a chance at reconciliation after a six-year standoff. The Biermanns descend on Turks and Caicos for their long-awaited vow renewal ceremony. Brielle's poorly-timed declaration brews trouble in paradise.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: I Do Take Two
programme.desc: Seven years to the day that Kim first locked eyes on Kroy, the Biermanns are set to renew their vows in Turks and Caicos. But rising tension with Brielle and a missing dress threaten Kim and Kroy's chances to say 'I do' all over again.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Prom and Circumstance
programme.desc: Most families have a lot on their plate. The Biermann's have a buffet: the Littles growing up too fast, Ariana's found her first true love, Brielle's looking to move out and Kroy's in search of a new career.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: A Rose Among Thorns
programme.desc: Kim wants her kids to live under her roof forever, but they have other plans. Buoyed by her best friend Brandon, Brielle ramps up the search for a place of her own. Meanwhile, Ariana recruits the family's nanny to aid in her quest for a license.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Loaded Statement
programme.desc: After a break-in hits too close to home, the Biermann's get serious about self-defence and attend a gun safety course. Brielle's so sure she found her perfect apartment that Ariana calls dibs on the room she'll leave behind.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: But First, Coffee
programme.desc: Kim wants Brielle to stay, Kroy wants Brielle to move out and they both don't want Ariana to be Brielle. So they lay down the law: whatever Ariana does with her life, it had better involve college. Off campus, the Biermann clan contemplates its future.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Mother Trucker
programme.desc: It's the dating game, and a now-single Brielle is on the hot seat. See if she will successfully play the field or strike out. Meanwhile, the Biermann clan spends some time in a food truck worker's shoes.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Oh Brother!
programme.desc: Kim is horrified by the prospect of turning 40. While Kroy tries to convince her to celebrate in style, they grapple with a frightening health issue, a shocking announcement from Brielle, and the emergence of a long-lost figure from Kim's past.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Lordy Lordy, Kimmie's 40
programme.desc: Kim's 40th birthday extravaganza is a gambling-themed party, but she's really hit the jackpot when it comes to her family and friends.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Brielle Doesn't Live Here Anymore
programme.desc: The moment Kim never believed would arrive is here: Brielle's move out day. When Ariana tries her hand at improv comedy, she's not sure the acting thing is really her scene.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Get Off My Wig
programme.desc: Brielle has spread her wings and tried to live on her own, only to learn she's more of a homing pigeon. Kim's glad to have Brielle back in the nest, especially since Ariana is looking to get her driver's license and fly the coop.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Kim Over Troubled Water
programme.desc: A family vacation to Miami culminates in the world premiere of Kim's new song for Key West Pride. While the family literally gets down and dirty in a swamp boat tour and a swim with the dolphins, Kim grapples with her phobias fear of performing.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Performance Anxiety
programme.desc: As Kim's Pride appearance approaches, her fear magnifies, and she worries, even with her family rallying behind her and giving her the courage to unleash her new song on the world. Also, the entire family is in flux with all the changes happening.

programme.title: Movie: The Fate of the Furious

programme.desc: When a time-travelling soldier named Cable arrives from the future to kill an innocent child, Deadpool assembles his own team of mutants called X-Force to stop him, recruiting Domino, Bedlam and Negasonic Teenage Warhead to his fledgling team.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Unexplained Structures
programme.desc: This episode examines 75 million years of the most credible alien evidence here on Earth, from the age of the dinosaurs, to ancient Egypt, to the skies over the western desert in the present day United States.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens, Plagues and Epidemics
programme.desc: Scientists are continually challenged by unidentified strains of bacteria with mysterious origins. Take a look at whether these strains could come from an extra terrestrial source.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Undead
programme.desc: Debates if there could be extraterrestrial origins in earthly encounters with the undead.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Destination Orion
programme.desc: Researchers suggest the Orion constellation might have been an alien entry point.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Prophets and Prophecies
programme.desc: For many years, humans have followed the words of prophets and prophecies. Who were they talking to or what were they talking to? Were seers possibly speaking with extraterrestrials? Are there more prophets like them today?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Superheroes
programme.desc: From the beginning of recorded history, humans have told stories of supernatural beings. While the ancients told stories about Zeus, Thor, and Hanuman, today we have superheroes such as Superman, Batman and Spiderman.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: While many discount stories of sea monsters as purely mythological, it is estimated that Earth's oceans are home to between 700,000 to one million species. Shockingly, two-thirds of those species still remain unknown.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Next Humans
programme.desc: Transhumanists envision a future in which we become cyborgs, achieving far superior intelligence and the possibility of immortality. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest superhuman beings have walked the Earth before.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Space Station Moon
programme.desc: It was mankind's finest hour, the greatest technological achievement of the 20th century: the Apollo 11 mission to the moon. The program was short lived, some believe it is because we encountered something, or someone, on the moon.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Forged by the Gods
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists discover more compelling clues to early visitations to earth by extraterrestrials. Astronomers are also learning of an increasing number of planets within the galaxy that could sustain life.

programme.title: Movie: Anatomy of a Murder
programme.desc: A small-town lawyer gets the case of a lifetime when a military man avenges an attack on his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Laura
programme.desc: When a detective investigates a death, he begins to fall in love with the deceased woman.

programme.title: Movie: People Will Talk
programme.desc: An unorthodox medical professor finds his methods challenged by his nemesis.

programme.title: Movie: Magnificent Obsession
programme.desc: When a drunken playboy accidentally kills a doctor, he attempts to redeem himself by going to medical school, so he can help the doctor's blind widow.

programme.title: Movie: A Man to Remember
programme.desc: Townsfolk come to appreciate the local doctor after he goes above and beyond the call of duty during a polio epidemic.

programme.title: Movie: The Citadel
programme.desc: A young doctor opens his first practice in a Welsh mining town and tries to determine why the miners all cough. When thwarted in this, he moves to London and scams wealthy hypochondriacs. Eventually, he learns what it means to be a real doctor.

programme.title: Movie: Red Beard
programme.desc: A doctor takes a young intern under his wing at a charity clinic.

programme.title: Movie: The Doctor and the Girl
programme.desc: A father teaches his son, a recent medical school graduate, to be cruel to patients. After meeting and falling in love with a runaway, the man changes his practices.

programme.title: Movie: Dark Victory
programme.desc: A selfish socialite falls for her doctor after learning that she has a brain tumour.

programme.title: Movie: The Painted Veil
programme.desc: An unfaithful wife eventually falls in love with her husband for the first time.

programme.title: Movie: Conquest
programme.desc: A Polish countess sacrifices her virtue to Napoleon to save her homeland.

programme.title: Movie: Camille
programme.desc: A kept woman leaves her patron when she falls in love with a young man. In fear of ruining his career prospects and his position in society, she leaves him and soon falls into poverty and illness.

programme.title: Movie: Ninotchka
programme.desc: Russian delegates are sent to Paris to sell Imperial jewels, but complications ensue.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed

programme.title: Snapped: Kristen Durgan
programme.desc: The disappearance of a devoted father reveals a treasure trove of family secrets and exposes a twisted plot driven by greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracie Miles
programme.desc: When a Kansas mother is discovered brutally murdered in her own home, investigators fear that her missing teenage daughter has met a similar fate. They scour the area for clues until rumors guide them to an unlikely mastermind.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Snapped: Helen Frazier
programme.desc: When an apparent slam dunk murder investigation becomes muddied by intricate stories, police discover their star witness is much closer to the murderer than they were initially led to believe.

programme.title: Snapped: Betty Neumar
programme.desc: The cold-case shooting of a Norwood, North Carolina man leaves his family shattered and without answers. After two decades pass the investigation resumes only to uncover mysterious deaths spanning a half-century.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Jenna Oakley and Kenneth Nigh
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a woman inside her Kentucky home triggers an investigation that reveals an underage romance fueled by obsession and rage.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Carol Giles and Tim Collier
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered in a town park, the investigation into what happened exposes a sordid tale of lust, torture, and two cases of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Michael Ivezic and Demitry Papasotiriou
programme.desc: When a respected Toronto bookkeeper is found murdered inside his home, the search for his killer focuses on two unexpected suspects and unearths shocking allegations of sex, scandal, and a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline: Evil Intent
programme.desc: When a young woman fails to show up to work, her mother rushes to her home to try to find her. When she discovers begins an investigation that leads to a suspect no one imagined.

programme.title: Dateline: Final Curtain
programme.desc: A soon-to-be bride is caught in the middle of a twisted murder plot that has detectives questioning if she played a role in it. Exclusive interviews and reporting unfold the case that made national headlines.

programme.title: Dateline: The Mansion on Ocean Boulevard
programme.desc: Two tragic deaths occur within one week of each other in a wealthy city in California, leading families to wonder what happened inside a beachfront mansion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Sting
programme.desc: Newlywed Dalia Dippolito returned home from the gym to the awful news that her husband had been killed. In a case where almost nothing was as it seemed, investigators wanted to know: Was Dalia diabolical or an unwitting pawn in a hoax gone wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Dark Valley
programme.desc: Gavin Smith was dashing. When he vanished, LA detectives were unsure if they were investigating a crime or a suicide. His wife said he'd gotten lost in drugs and flings. Police wondered if the key to finding Gavin was hidden in one of those affairs.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: As Night Fell
programme.desc: Heidy and Conrad Truman were an enviable couple with a bright future. Then, one fateful night, Heidy was found shot and, just like that, she was gone.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at a trash facility, a detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know she will come face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: Wealthy residents felt safe in their gated community but it was not safe for one millionaire, murdered in his waterfront home. Police investigated but the case grew cold. Turned out the key to solving it, or two keys, were right at the front door.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa swooped into Vanessa Pond's life and stole her heart. Then Vanessa discovered her dream man had a tragic past. His first wife had been killed. Was he a grieving widower or somehow involved? Dark secrets were about to be spilled.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in South Beach
programme.desc: Wendy Trapaga was a beaming young bride. Then, just four days after saying 'I do' she was found dead in a parking lot. Investigators discovered the newlyweds were keeping secrets. There was also someone else with a secret and it was combustible.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: In high school, Christian, Erika and Pedro formed a tight trio: best friends who excelled at academics and shared big dreams. When they went to college something changed. It started with a secret romance and ended in tragedy.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Nikki Whitehead was a single mom working toward a brighter future. She found love, moved into a nice neighborhood and enrolled in college. Then, tragedy struck. Police searched for answers but one thing was certain. This crime was personal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: An Army veteran vanishes before her college graduation. A massive search turns up nothing, but detectives do find a clue: a cryptic 911 call that helps uncover the truth and exposes a twisted story of unrequited love.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Was Waiting
programme.desc: Vince Goslyn found his calling in the military. His career was thriving and he had built a beautiful family. Then one night, the father of five was gunned down. Did his decision to help someone in need cost him his life or was he targeted?

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Who is the Younger Lady?
programme.desc: The mutilated mummy of the Younger Lady has mystified Egyptologists for over a hundred years. New evidence finally reveals who she was and why her brutal death is directly linked to the world-famous Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Egypt's Lost Queen
programme.desc: A brand-new discovery inside a 3,000-year-old treasure chest may lead experts to the Egyptian pharaoh who was erased from history: a woman named Hatshepsut, who was one of the most controversial and successful pharaohs of all time.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Who Killed the Warrior King?
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of Pharaoh Seqenenre Taa is a murder mystery that endures to this day. A team of the world's leading Egyptologists and crime experts embark on a spectacular journey to discover the truth behind his brutal and humiliating death.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: The Screaming Mummy Conspiracy
programme.desc: The horrifying remains of the 3,000-year-old Screaming Mummy have haunted Egyptologists for decades. A team of experts re-examine the evidence, revealing an epic conspiracy to murder a king and a punishment intended to curse a soul for eternity.

programme.title: Street Science: Hollywood Explosions
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts investigate the explosive power of gasoline. Using cutting-edge science experiments, they find if a tank of gas really explodes like it does in the movies and what it takes to make a Hollywood-style fireball.

programme.title: Street Science: Masters of Fire
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts take on the ultimate fire challenge. Using cutting-edge science experiments, they investigate how a person can eat fire, walk on fire, and be set on fire. They'll also show how everyday ingredients can make an explosive boom.

programme.title: Street Science: Monster Water Gun
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts try to build the world's largest and most powerful water gun and test it to see if the mega weapon has the muscle to shoot through concrete.

programme.title: Street Science: Dueling Infernos
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts investigate how a basic backyard grill can make a huge explosion. Using cutting-edge science experiments, they test which gases make the biggest inferno.

programme.title: Street Science: Car Chaos
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts use cutting-edge experiments to investigate the hidden dangers of a car crash, and if everyday objects can stop an arrow fired from a high-powered crossbow.

programme.title: Street Science: Dead Drop Danger
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts test the laws of gravity in a series of wild, Galileo-inspired experiments.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Sleep
programme.desc: Go inside the astonishing science of the world's strangest places to sleep. In Sweden, visitors can stay at an invisible hotel. A couple has converted a relic of the cold war into a family home. And learn how to sleep in a pressurized tin can for 28 days.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Fell From the Sky
programme.desc: Revealing some of the strangest things that have fallen from the sky around the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Jobs
programme.desc: Meet people with the strangest jobs in the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Underground
programme.desc: Featuring the largest collection of mummies; the secret bunker below New York's Grand Central Terminal; hundreds of miles of tunnels that lie beneath Las Vegas; astronomers who look at the stars two miles underground.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Vehicles
programme.desc: Flying using only water power; an underwater car; a boat that is built to deliberately sink; a huge plane style boat that might revolutionize travel.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places
programme.desc: An American lake that swallows land and boats; a road in Scotland where gravity seems to be suspended and cars roll up hills; an island where tourists get their kicks surfing the jet streams of planes.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Man and His Gun
programme.desc: Michelle has ended her relationship with alcoholic Richard and is looking forward to getting on with her life. But Richard can't let go and as his obsession grows deeper it's clear their lives will be ripped apart by the violent consequences.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Stalker's Imagination
programme.desc: When Katerina leaves her husband, he fights back in imaginative ways to cause her pain, including getting Katerina locked up for a crime she hasn't committed. Katerina must do the unthinkable if she wants to escape forever.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker
programme.desc: When Idaho hairdresser Makaela Zabel-Gravatt begins cutting the hair of truck driver Christopher Wirfs, little does she realize that it signals the start of a two-year long nightmare that will end in the most heart-stopping and disturbing way.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: This is Not a Drill
programme.desc: It was an ordinary day at Chardon High School in Ohio, full of the fights, laughs and boisterous behaviour that fill the corridors of any high school. But all that changes when one young man shows up with violence on his mind.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: In Colorado, a 911 dispatcher receives a call from a woman in distress. Seven-months pregnant, another woman has slashed her throat. As the dispatcher uncovers the horrific event linking these women, she forges a fast friendship with the victim.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Danger Travels
programme.desc: A retail store employee's crush on manager Antoinette Venditti Bruce escalates into an obsession after he's fired for inappropriate behavior. When she is transferred out of state for work, the stalker tracks her down to carry out his twisted plans.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: In Colorado, a 911 dispatcher receives a call from a woman in distress. Seven-months pregnant, another woman has slashed her throat. As the dispatcher uncovers the horrific event linking these women, she forges a fast friendship with the victim.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Danger Travels
programme.desc: A retail store employee's crush on manager Antoinette Venditti Bruce escalates into an obsession after he's fired for inappropriate behavior. When she is transferred out of state for work, the stalker tracks her down to carry out his twisted plans.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: This is Not a Drill
programme.desc: It was an ordinary day at Chardon High School in Ohio, full of the fights, laughs and boisterous behaviour that fill the corridors of any high school. But all that changes when one young man shows up with violence on his mind.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: The Code
programme.desc: Rap star Corey 'C-Murder' Miller was convicted of killing one of his fans after a fight broke out at a crowded nightclub. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva have been called in by C-Murder's family to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: High-Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: Pest control worker Kim Cain was convicted of murdering a 71-year-old Palm Beach socialite. The prosecution argued she found Cain stealing her jewelry to support a gambling addiction. Cain's family is hoping Chris and Fatima can prove his innocence.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Death by Design
programme.desc: A couple's fight reaches a tragic end when one of them is shot. A tape recorder that's captured final words becomes evidence in a murder trial. When more tapes are found, the jury must examine a violent history and decide the fate of a possible murderer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Sex, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: A mom accused of the murder of a stranger must clear her name by secretly-recording a confession from the man she claims is framing her. Sordid revelations of a secret life lead police to prove the guilt of an obsessive, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: The Sound of Terror
programme.desc: In 1983, the Secret Service are on the trail of a counterfeiter. In a storage unit, they find sickening audio recordings of him torturing dozens of women. Analyzing the tapes, they realize that he may be one of the most depraved serial killers in history.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Devil at the Crossroads
programme.desc: 11-year-old Shauna Howe disappears as she returns home from a girl scouts Halloween party. When Shauna's body shows up in a local creek, her murder ignites an investigation, whose conclusion will send shockwaves through her community.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Killer Night Out
programme.desc: Bright and beautiful nurse's aide 19-year-old Janean Brown is found dead in a drainage ditch, her throat cut so deep she is almost decapitated. A riveting investigation will reveal a darker account of the night she died than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Unholy Communion
programme.desc: A devoted fiancé makes a devastating discovery: his beloved partner Anne Boncella and her 8-year-old daughter have been brutally murdered. The ensuing investigation will unravel shocking secrets that have lain dormant in their seemingly peaceful hometown.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: A Mystery in the Pines
programme.desc: Caught in a love triangle, young chef and mom Heather Mallory vanishes. Now Portland detectives and Heather's parents search for the truth in an investigation involving wiretaps, confidential informants and a dramatic resolution deep in the forest.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Terror in the Pines
programme.desc: He was the most wanted man in America, a triple murderer on the run with nothing to lose and chilling confession letter threatening cops. When he meets a single mom who falls for his charms, time will tell if he can keep the secret.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: After beautiful and brilliant Tiffany Jenks is killed in Fairview Oregon, an investigation uncovers multiple suspects, including Tiffany's ex-boyfriend and three strangers who meet her at a bar and reveals a twisted and mysterious motive for murder.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Rage in Rose City
programme.desc: A home invasion turns deadly with the near decapitation of a young man. Portland homicide detectives can't rule out the victim's best friend and girlfriend as suspects, until several other suspects come to light in a case of personal and brutal overkill.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Armor
programme.desc: A look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to the heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction
programme.desc: Setting the record straight about the most familiar and beloved stories from U.S. history.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Apocalypse: The Rise of Hitler

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tennessee Dream Pool
programme.desc: The Yarbrough family, Franklin Tennessee locals, call upon the experts at Peek Pools and Spas to build their dream pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael Jr. take things to the next level as they decide to go into business together. They purchase an outdated, suburban property and face a wonky layout, too many stairs and open-concept headaches.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael figure out the open-concept dilemma at the Suburban House and turn their attention outside, where their plans for a spacious new deck come up short. They must quickly find a solution before the fast-approaching open house arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael rush to finish the Country House before winter hits, but their schedule and budget are tested when an open permit, left on the barn by previous owners, is discovered.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I'll Have What They're Having
programme.desc: Antonia Lofaso falls in love with a sourdough cinnamon roll in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Manila
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Manila's iconic foods, from slow roasted pork to chicken inasal.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City has the most people of any city in the western hemisphere, and they all love to eat. Home to some of the best street food on Earth, Andrew Zimmern explores tasty traditions like barbacoa, chicharrone and huarache.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Mis-Steaks Were Made
programme.desc: The BBQ's are fired up and so are the chefs in the Wildfire Round. It's a game of fins or tentacles in the Crossfire Round, and in the Feast of Fire, the chefs take on French cuisine for the win.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Return to Roblox High School
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Boss Battle Bonanza
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Whoa-Oh, I'm On A Roll
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Takeover

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: LOL the Vote
programme.desc: Chance is hoping to be voted 'class clown' for a record breaking fourth year in a row, but finds out Bailey is also vying for the title. Dusty is vying for 'most academic.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party Hearty
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: WWE Edition
programme.desc: WWE superstars join the cast of professional pranksters to pull off some of the most outrageous pranks yet including staging a fake infomercial fiasco, making an arm wrestling video game come to life, and turning a house upside down.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: There's a New Kid in Town
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Wigging Out
programme.desc: When Bailey's hairstylist is sick, a new stylist has to cut her hair. Meanwhile, Chance is trying to find a way to make Herman fly.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Slumber Party
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Wedding
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Blind Date
programme.desc: The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom. Meanwhile, a target is hired to be on-air talent for a home shopping network owned by Chance's dad.

programme.title: The Third Day
programme.desc: Two people in two different times explore a mysterious island and get to know the locals.

programme.title: Movie: Yesterday

programme.title: Movie: Unstoppable
programme.desc: A conductor and a veteran engineer race against the clock to stop an unmanned freight train before it reaches a city and causes a catastrophe.

programme.title: Movie: Raising Arizona
programme.desc: An eccentric, childless couple decide to kidnap one baby from a set of quintuplets.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
programme.desc: True to his promise, the dark wizard Grindelwald escapes from custody while being transferred to Europe to answer for his crimes, and begins assembling followers who share his ambitions, but he's opposed by a young wizard with a love of magical beasts.

programme.title: Movie: Iverson
programme.desc: Allen Iverson tells story of his rise to fame. He talks about his turbulent childhood living in crushing poverty in Virginia, and his controversial run-ins with the law. He also covers his rejection of convention and off the court embrace of hip hop.

programme.title: Shameless: A Great Cause

programme.desc: In this remake of the 1968 horror classic, seven terrified people fight off a ravenous horde of flesh-eating zombies, which have trapped them in an old farmhouse.

programme.title: Movie: Marley
programme.desc: Chronicling the life and times of Bob Marley.
